user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of salary revision questions with their type, options, specificity and mandatory flag, so that I can review the questionnaire configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Salary Revision Questionnaire screen; When the list loads; Then each question shows question text, question type, options, employee class specific, position specific and is mandatory

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable whether a questionnaire is required while revising an employee's salary, so that reviewers complete it during the revision process
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Salary Revision Questionnaire screen; When I set "Do you need questionnaire while revising salary of employee ?" to Yes; Then the questionnaire is enabled for salary revisions

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new question, so that I can capture the information needed during salary revision
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Salary Revision Questionnaire screen; When I click Add new question and complete the details; Then the new question is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure a question's options with value, score and display order, so that responses can be scored and ordered consistently
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a question; When I enter Value, Score and Display Order for its options; Then the option settings are saved with the question

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to mark a question as mandatory and set it as employee class or position specific, so that the right questions apply to the right reviews
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring a question; When I set Is mandatory, Employee class specific and Position specific; Then the question applies according to those settings

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save a question and continue to the next using Save & Next, so that I can efficiently build the questionnaire
acceptance_criteria: Given I am editing a question; When I click Save & Next; Then the current question is saved and I proceed to the next question

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing question and refresh the list, so that the questionnaire stays current
acceptance_criteria: Given a question exists in the list; When I click Edit, change details and Refresh the list; Then the updated question is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to close the question editor without saving, so that I can discard unintended changes
acceptance_criteria: Given I am editing a question; When I click Close or Cancel; Then no changes are saved and I return to the questionnaire list
